summary: Second docs pass on runtime2-generator-obp covering coder/v7 (Variable + IRawNameResolvable migration; 22 handlers migrated to Data<Variable>; Legacy property emitter and [VariableName] attribute deleted; PLNG001 collapsed to two-rule gate) and coder/v8 (generator-side pre-Run guard restoring MissingRequiredParameter for non-nullable Data<Variable> slots). Five documentation files updated: root CLAUDE.md (OBP shape line + property kinds entry rewritten); architecture.md (catalog attribute list, source-gen tree, property-kinds table + new Variable paragraph); good_to_know.md (property-kinds section reduced to two rules + new App.Variables.Variable section + [Sensitive] cross-reference cleaned); action-catalog.md (attribute table, type-shape table, fully-annotated variable.set example, trailing literal type-tag references); Documentation/Runtime2/todos.md (2026-04-30 entry marked RESOLVED with actual approach taken). All three CLAUDE.md proposals from coder/v7 applied (folded into root CLAUDE.md, good_to_know.md, todos.md per their respective targets). Coder's XML docs on the new public surface (Variable, IRawNameResolvable) are excellent — added none. Verdict: PASS.

changes.description: Line 21: dropped Legacy/ from the Emission/Property tree. Line 25: replaced the three-rule property kinds entry with the two-rule (Data<T> / [Provider] T) contract; added the Data<Variable> + IRawNameResolvable description for variable-name slots and a forward-pointer to the v8 MissingRequiredParameter guard.

Four edits. (a) Catalog attribute model line: dropped [VariableName] from the attribute list, added a one-liner that variable-name slots are now typed via Data<App.Variables.Variable>. (b) Source-generator tree diagram: dropped Legacy/this.cs, annotated Data/this.cs with '(incl. Data<Variable> name-slots)'. (c) Property-kinds table: [VariableName] string row removed; PLNG001 message updated. (d) New paragraph after the table covering Variable + IRawNameResolvable + the v8 missing-name guard, with cross-references.

Three edits. (a) Property-kinds section: bullet for [VariableName] string removed; PLNG001 message updated; 'Why the gate exists' paragraph rewritten; 'Currently exempt' block deleted (no exemptions remain). (b) New section 'App.Variables.Variable - the variable-name carrier' covering: what it is, why it exists, the implicit-conversion gotcha (var s = name.Value infers Variable not string), the nullable-foreach variant, WasPercentWrapped's purpose, and the v8 missing-name guard with the noted empty-string-slot follow-up. (c) [Sensitive] short-name attribute-matching note: removed the [VariableName] cross-reference.

Four edits. (a) Property attribute table: [VariableName] row removed. (b) Type-shape table: new row for Data<App.Variables.Variable> describing how it renders (as 'string' with a %var% value). (c) Fully-annotated variable.set example: [VariableName] partial string Name replaced with partial Data<Variable> Name; comments updated to describe the IRawNameResolvable dispatch and .Value use site. (d) Two trailing string-literal references to '[%var% string]' (the old type tag) corrected to '[string]' per the actual post-v7 catalog rendering.

2026-04-30 [VariableName] migration entry marked RESOLVED 2026-05-01 with one-paragraph summary of the actual approach (Variable + IRawNameResolvable, not VarRef<T>) and the v8 missing-name guard. Original design discussion preserved below as archived context.

coder/v7 proposal #1 (target /PLang/App/CLAUDE.md, replace property-kinds rule with the two-rule + Variable contract): applied by folding into root CLAUDE.md. Same scoping reasoning as v1 - no per-folder file exists; the existing 'Property kinds' line at root is the canonical location.

coder/v7 proposal #2 (Variable section in good_to_know.md): applied verbatim with one expansion - added a paragraph about the v8 missing-name guard (post-dates the proposal, but lives in the same section).

coder/v7 proposal #3 (close 2026-04-30 [VariableName] migration entry): applied with a one-paragraph resolution summary instead of just a checkbox tick - the original options discussion is preserved as archival context for anyone tracing the design path.

claude_md_proposals.reason: Genuinely canonical - PLNG001 enforces the property-kinds rule at build time across the whole tree, and the Data<Variable> + IRawNameResolvable contract applies to every future name-slot handler. Folded into root CLAUDE.md (no /PLang/App/CLAUDE.md exists; the existing root 'Property kinds' line is the right location). Augmented with the v8 missing-name guard description from the auditor/v3 PASS context.

Variable's implicit-conversion gotcha (var infers Variable not string) and IRawNameResolvable dispatch are exactly the cross-cutting non-obvious shape that good_to_know.md is for - multiple files reference it, no single source file describes it end-to-end. Coder's proposed text used as the spine; expanded with the v8 missing-name guard paragraph.

Closing a delivered todo is plain hygiene. Used a fuller resolution paragraph than the proposal suggested (single-line tail) because the original entry's 'options 1-3' design discussion is useful archival context for anyone tracing why the migration ended up at Variable-as-typed-payload rather than VarRef<T>.

findings.issue: No PLang .goal example covers the MissingRequiredParameter ServiceError surface for variable-name slots. PLang developers writing handlers that take Data<Variable> won't have a worked example showing the error flow when the slot is omitted.
findings.detail: PLang .goal examples are the tester's job. Same pattern as v1 finding #1 (resolution-cycle keys). Out of scope for this docs pass - flagging for visibility. Not blocking; the contract is documented in good_to_know.md and architecture.md.
